atomic_norms: weighting arguments must precede assessment.

results.norm: Flagging mechanism: flags must cite a specific principle; disputes preserved in record without in-process adjudication; unfounded flag patterns are discountable.
atomic_norms: Flagging mechanism: flags must cite a specific principle; disputes preserved in record without in-process adjudication; unfounded flag patterns are discountable.

results.norm: Good-faith application: invoking norms for competitive advantage rather than process integrity is itself a violation.
atomic_norms: Good-faith application: invoking norms for competitive advantage rather than process integrity is itself a violation.

results.norm: Agents must contribute their genuine best thinking; no strategic withholding, inflation, or false confidence. (Epistemic honesty)
atomic_norms: Agents must contribute their genuine best thinking; no strategic withholding, inflation, or false confidence. (Epistemic honesty)

results.norm: Contributions count when stated; no retroactive credit-claiming beyond what the verbatim record supports.
atomic_norms: Contributions count when stated; no retroactive credit-claiming beyond what the verbatim record supports.

results.norm: Evaluation tracks distinct conceptual moves, not volume; padding and flooding are negative contributions. (No contribution flooding)
atomic_norms: Evaluation tracks distinct conceptual moves, not volume; padding and flooding are negative contributions. (No contribution flooding)

results.norm: Allocation is earned by positive contributions meeting the five-criterion standard (specific, responsive, advancing of collective understanding, calibrated, parsimonious); absence of violations is not itself a contribution. Positive Contribution Standard A strong contribution is: (1) specific makes an identifiable claim or move; (2) responsive engages with the prior record rather than ignoring it; (3) advancing of collective understanding moves the group forward, not just the contributor's position; (4) calibrated expressed confidence matches actual epistemic warrant; (5) parsimonious makes its point without padding. Allocation reflects positive contributions assessed against this standard. Absence of detectable violation earns no allocation on its own. Load-Bearing Substantive Norms 1. Epistemic honesty contribute genuine best thinking; no strategic withholding or inflation 2. Transparent attribution acknowledge when building on others' ideas 3. No strategic silence don't withhold relevant objections or insights to let others fail first 4. No retroactive credit-claiming contributions count when stated; the verbatim record governs 5. No contribution flooding evaluation tracks distinct conceptual moves, not volume 6. No norm-gaming norm-drafting participation is one contribution type, not a privileged meta-contribution 7. Accurate disagreement only an objection is a negative contribution if it is demonstrably inaccurate or introduces no new reasoning beyond what was already addressed
atomic_norms: Allocation is earned by positive contributions meeting the five-criterion standard (specific, responsive, advancing of collective understanding, calibrated, parsimonious); absence of violations is not itself a contribution. Positive Contribution Standard A strong contribution is: (1) specific makes an identifiable claim or move; (2) responsive engages with the prior record rather than ignoring it; (3) advancing of collective understanding moves the group forward, not just the contributor's position; (4) calibrated expressed confidence matches actual epistemic warrant; (5) parsimonious makes its point without padding. Allocation reflects positive contributions assessed against this standard. Absence of detectable violation earns no allocation on its own.
Epistemic honesty contribute genuine best thinking; no strategic withholding or inflation
Transparent attribution acknowledge when building on others' ideas
No strategic silence don't withhold relevant objections or insights to let others fail first
No retroactive credit-claiming contributions count when stated; the verbatim record governs
No contribution flooding evaluation tracks distinct conceptual moves, not volume
No norm-gaming norm-drafting participation is one contribution type, not a privileged meta-contribution
Accurate disagreement only an objection is a negative contribution if it is demonstrably inaccurate or introduces no new reasoning beyond what was already addressed

results.norm: self-descriptions of contributions must be verifiable against the verbatim record
atomic_norms: self-descriptions of contributions must be verifiable against the verbatim record

results.norm: Omission is not contribution allocation is earned by positive contributions meeting the five-criterion standard; the absence of violations, however complete, is not itself a positive contribution and earns no allocation independently Norms 1, 2, and 8 are lexically prior. Violations there corrupt the evidentiary basis for assessing everything else. The remaining load-bearing norms are roughly co-equal in weight. Evaluation criteria are drafted collectively and stated explicitly before deliberation concludes. External reviewer applies the observable-behavior standard to the full verbatim record, including all rounds. Agents' self-characterizations are checked against the record, not taken at face value. Where contributions are genuinely co-equal in quality and quantity, the reviewer records equivalence rather than imposes artificial ranking. Where timing is genuinely ambiguous and no other evidence resolves it, priority goes to earlier record position.
atomic_norms: Omission is not contribution allocation is earned by positive contributions meeting the five-criterion standard; the absence of violations, however complete, is not itself a positive contribution and earns no allocation independently
Evaluation criteria are drafted collectively and stated explicitly before deliberation concludes.
External reviewer applies the observable-behavior standard to the full verbatim record, including all rounds.
Agents' self-characterizations are checked against the record, not taken at face value.
Where contributions are genuinely co-equal in quality and quantity, the reviewer records equivalence rather than imposes artificial ranking.
Where timing is genuinely ambiguous and no other evidence resolves it, priority goes to earlier record position.

results.norm: Collective problem-solving takes priority over positional maneuvering; this is the tiebreaker when specific norms conflict or don't cover a case.
atomic_norms: Collective problem-solving takes priority over positional maneuvering; this is the tiebreaker when specific norms conflict or don't cover a case.
